notes: #518 BOTH sandbox-doable code blockers MERGED to main (53de5b6). (a) item #2, PR #526: deterministic directive one-sentence salvage (lib/briefing/generator.ts applyDirectiveOneSentenceSalvage) so commitment-exposure directives with a trailing explanatory sentence stop failing 'directive must be exactly one sentence', burning paid retries, and shipping nothing. (b) item #3, PR #528: segmented the manual directive cap (lib/utils/api-tracker.ts isOverManualCallLimit) to count only interactive rows (pipeline_run_id IS NULL) — cron directive rows run inside runWithPipelineRunContext and carried a pipeline_run_id, so one morning cron's 8+ rows blew the manual cap of 3 and short-circuited the dashboard 'Generate Now' self-test. Cap stays 3 (misattribution fix, not a billing-rail loosening). Proof for both: directive-one-sentence-salvage.test.ts + manual-call-limit-segmentation.test.ts + lib/briefing 836 + api-tracker.test.ts green; gate:continuity + eslint clean; no paid loop, no prod mutation. NO open PR. REMAINING is owner/cron-side ONLY (sandbox cannot do: no CRON_SECRET, no paid LLM, foldera.ai 403s sandbox): (1) the next 11:00 UTC morning-pipeline cron should flip pipeline_runs.outcome generation_failed_sentinel -> generation_returned once a grounded candidate ranks top — this is the live product proof, the only score; (2) set Vercel OWNER_USER_ID/FOLDERA_SELF_USER_ID -> 2cbc1bab-8e0e-43b0-bf4a-9a0cd6b5d91f; (3) /invite the Foldera bot to #all-foldera-dev for failure alerts.
